description: Early-return guard clauses replaced with four levels of nested conditionals.
diff:
diff --git a/processor.py b/processor.py
--- a/processor.py
+++ b/processor.py
@@ -1,6 +1,7 @@
 def process(data):
-    if not data:
-        return None
-    if not data.get("items"):
-        return None
-    return [transform(i) for i in data["items"]]
+    if data:
+        if data.get("items"):
+            items = data["items"]
+            if items:
+                return [transform(i) for i in items]
+    return None
